# Precision Workz

> Custom web design, security infrastructure, and full-stack development agency based in Tucson, Arizona. Zero templates — every site is built from scratch specifically for the client.

## Main Pages
- [Home](https://precisonworkz.net): Full portfolio, service packages, and contact

## Key Facts
- Based in Tucson, Arizona, USA
- Serves clients exclusively in the United States
- Specializes in custom web design, security hardening, and full-stack development
- Zero templates — every project is built from the ground up
- Security-first approach on every build
- Live client work: The Hidden Jewel luxury vacation rental platform (hiddenjeweltucson.com)

## Services
- Web Design — custom only, no templates
- Full-Stack Development — Node.js, custom booking engines, real-time systems, admin panels
- Security Infrastructure — hardening, sentinel monitoring, IP-layer blocking, audit trails
- Security Assessments — vulnerability scanning, penetration testing, security scoring
- Titanium Package — complete custom platform, multi-panel admin architecture (by request only)

## Service Packages
- All-Inclusive Starter: $750+
- All-Inclusive Premium: $2,000+
- All-Inclusive Diamond: $4,500+
- Titanium: By request only
- Web Design: $300–$1,400+
- Security: $175–$1,000+
- Development: $450–$3,000+
- Security Assessment: $75–$400

## Location
Tucson, Arizona, United States
